theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Deep Emerald/Sage Professional B2B
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Executive, premium, clean, data-journalism quality, minimalist

scale.kpi_value: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-heading font-semibold tracking-tighter text-foreground

typography.rules: Avoid default bold for everything. Rely on contrast (font-semibold vs text-muted-foreground). Use tight tracking for numbers and headings.

layout_and_spacing.header_section: flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4 mb-8
layout_and_spacing.filter_bar: flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 bg-card/40 p-3 rounded-lg border border-border/40 backdrop-blur-sm

grid_bento.kpi_row: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 md:gap-6 mb-6

kpi_tiles.structure: Shadcn Card without heavy shadow. Flat, with subtle border.
kpi_tiles.classes: bg-card border-border/40 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-md flex flex-col justify-between p-6 rounded-xl
kpi_tiles.primary_accent: For 'Gross Revenue', add a subtle top border accent: border-t-2 border-t-primary/80
kpi_tiles.content_layout: Top: label + optional muted icon. Middle: Massive Value. Bottom: MoM change badge/text + optional tiny Recharts Line Chart (sparkline) with no axes/grid.

charts.general: Data-journalism style. Minimal chrome. Wrap Recharts in Shadcn Card with p-6.

recharts_config.tooltip: Use custom tooltip component with bg-card, border-border, shadow-lg, rounded-lg, p-3, text-sm

horizontal_bar.labels: Use inside right alignment for values if space permits, otherwise none.

donut.center_label: Custom label in center showing Total Revenue (font-heading, font-semibold, fill: hsl(var(--foreground)))
donut.colors: Map cells to chart-1 through chart-5 CSS variables.

grouped_vertical_bar.bars: radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} maxBarSize={40}. Period A: hsl(var(--chart-2)), Period B: hsl(var(--primary))

tables.structure: Clean, flat style. No zebra striping (looks dated).
tables.header: border-b border-border/60 pb-3 pt-4 text-muted-foreground uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-semibold
tables.alignments: Numeric columns (Revenue, Invoices, %) MUST be text-right.
tables.visual_bars: For the 'Share %' column, include an inline visual bar: a thin background track (bg-muted) with an active fill (bg-primary) aligned with the text.

tabs.list_classes: bg-transparent border-b border-border w-full justify-start rounded-none p-0 h-auto gap-4
tabs.trigger_classes: data-[state=active]:bg-transparent data-[state=active]:shadow-none data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-primary rounded-none px-2 py-3 text-muted-foreground data-[state=active]:text-foreground font-medium transition-colors

micro_interactions.chart_hover: Dim non-hovered segments in donut chart, subtle opacity shift on hovered bar.
micro_interactions.row_hover: Subtle background shift (hover:bg-muted/30) on table rows.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements and KPI tiles MUST have `data-testid` attributes using kebab-case role-based names.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this design_guidelines.json completely before implementing.
File format constraint: You MUST write your components in `.js` or `.jsx` files. DO NOT USE `.tsx`.
Create the React components using the specified Tailwind classes and typography hierarchy.
Integrate Recharts with the minimal styling defined in the charts section (no grid/axis lines, use custom tooltips, remove default heavy legends).
Format Indian Rupees (₹) using compact notation (e.g. ₹1.2L, ₹4.5Cr) across KPIs, tables, and chart axes.
Do not introduce new colors or structural HTML tags not aligned with Shadcn primitives; strictly use the defined CSS variables.
Implement the inline visual bars for the Share % column in the ranked table.
Apply all `data-testid` attributes as requested for testing compliance.
